title: Claude Desktop spawns 1.8 GB Hyper-V VM on every launch, even for chat-only use
summary: A GitHub issue reports that Claude Desktop launches a 1.8 GB Hyper-V VM on every startup, even for simple chat interactions. This raises concerns about resource overhead, startup latency, and whether the VM is necessary for non-agentic tasks. The discussion highlights potential inefficiencies in the desktop application's architecture.
